<!--

External pull requests are not accepted on this repository.

See CONTRIBUTING.md for the full posture and rationale. Short version: this is
a personal framework that encodes one operator's specific working style. The
right move for adapting it is to fork it under the MIT license and tailor your
fork to your own conventions.

If you opened this PR by mistake, close it. If you opened it expecting a
merge, please convert to an issue describing the change you'd like, marked
with the `[suggestion]` prefix. I read suggestions and incorporate them when
they fit the design.

-->
